zh.lifeSummary: 當Apollonia Muller於1528年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格恩可萊斯斯特勞本哈特奧頓豪森時，她的父親Martin Miller28歲，母親Anna Hechel28歲。她於1549年與Michel Scheffer在德國巴登-爾特波格恩可萊斯斯特勞本哈特奧頓豪森結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Apollonia Muller于1528年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格恩可萊斯斯特勞本哈特奧頓豪森时，她的父亲Martin Miller28岁，母亲Anna Hechel28岁。她于1549年与Michel Scheffer在德国巴登-爾特波格恩可萊斯斯特勞本哈特奧頓豪森结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Muller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Ernst, Fritz, Franz, Gerhard, Uwe, Dieter, Heinz, Jurgen.
German (Müller) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; mainly Müller): see Mueller . This surname is also very common in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Windmiller
meanings: Americanized form of German Windmüller, an occupational name for a miller (see Muller ).

variants.name: Mueller
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhard, Klaus, Heinz, Helmut, Wolfgang, Manfred, Horst.

German (mainly Müller) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Müller); Dutch: occupational name for a miller, Middle High German müller, German Müller. In Germany, Müller, Mueller is the most frequent of all surnames; in the US it is often changed to Miller or appears as Muller . See also Mulder .

nameMeanings.name: Apollonia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of the Greek masculine name Apollonios, an adjectival derivative of the name of the sun god, Apollo. This is of uncertain origin, and may be pre-Greek. St Apollonia was an elderly deaconess martyred at Alexandria under the Emperor Decius in the mid 3rd century.

en.lifeSummary: When Apollonia Muller was born in 1528, in Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, her father, Martin Miller, was 28 and her mother, Anna Hechel, was 28. She married Michel Scheffer in 1549, in Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Apollonia Muller est née en 1528, à Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Martin Miller, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Anna Hechel, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Michel Scheffer en 1549, à Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Apollonia Muller 1528 in Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Martin Miller 28 und ihre Mutter Anna Hechel 28. Sie hat 1549 in Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland Michel Scheffer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Apollonia Muller è nata il nel 1528 nel Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Martin Miller, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Anna Hechel, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Michel Scheffer nel 1549, nel Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Apollonia Mullerが1528年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグエンズクレイスストラウベンハートオッテンハウセンで生まれた時，父Martin Millerは28歳，母Anna Hechelは28歳であった。1549年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグエンズクレイスストラウベンハートオッテンハウセンでMichel Schefferと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Apollonia Muller(이)가 1528년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 즈크레이스 스트라벤하르드트 오텐하우센에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Martin Miller(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Hechel(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1549년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 즈크레이스 스트라벤하르드트 오텐하우센에서 Michel Scheffer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Apollonia Muller nasceu em 1528, em Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Martin Miller, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Anna Hechel, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Michel Scheffer em 1549, em Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Apollonia Muller родилась в 1528 г. в местности оттенаусен, страубенардт, энзкрис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Martin Miller было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Hechel, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Michel Scheffer в 1549 г. в местности оттенаусен, страубенардт, энзкрис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Apollonia Muller nació en 1528, en Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Martin Miller, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Anna Hechel, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Michel Scheffer en 1549, en Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 3 hijas.
